name: typescript-ui-public
description: Marketplace for the typescript-ui plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: typescript-ui
plugins.description: TypeScript 6 UI engineering team. Designs, reviews, optimizes, and improves UI code so it looks like a human design team built it — distinctive aesthetic point-of-view, OKLCH color systems, variable typography, motion with spring physics, sub-2.5s LCP, sub-200ms INP, sub-0.1 CLS, and TS6 strict-mode type safety with branded primitives, discriminated unions, and exhaustiveness. Six specialists (design architect, design reviewer, performance engineer, TypeScript engineer, anti-AI auditor, team lead), running on the session model, backed by self-contained references on TS6, Tailwind v4 + OKLCH + APCA, anti-AI-aesthetic patterns, Core Web Vitals, WCAG 2.2 + reduced motion, and component architecture (compound, polymorphic, slot). Four user-invoked skills: typescript-design-ui, typescript-review-ui, typescript-optimize-ui, typescript-improve-ui. Read-only by default; the orchestrator applies findings only on explicit user approval.
